title: Hacked Page
body: [![](http://img214.imageshack.us/img214/1319/indexhp6te2.jpg)](http://www.depre.net/hack.php) It's been a couple of days since one of my blogs, [depre.net](http://www.depre.net), has been **hacked**. Once the security problems have been fixed, the page is active again, but I want to take advantage of this post to thank the author who has done just what a good hacker should do, limiting himself to putting up his own [home](http://www.depre.net/hack.php) without destroying anything. Thank you.
